cases.Description: Users in the accounting department are experiencing timeout errors when generating monthly financial reports. The issue occurs primarily between 2-4 PM during peak usage.
Contact records are not syncing from Salesforce to our internal CRM. Last successful sync was 3 days ago. Approximately 450 records are pending.
New Dell docking station purchased for remote worker is not being detected by Windows 11. Tried multiple USB-C ports and cables.
cases.Resolution: Updated Thunderbolt driver to version 4.2.1. Docking station now recognized and all peripherals working.

cases.Case Title: Data discrepancy in Q1 revenue report
cases.Description: The Q1 revenue dashboard shows $2.3M but the exported CSV totals to $2.1M. Suspect a filtering issue in the dashboard query.
Marketing team needs the ability to export more than 1000 records at a time from the campaign manager. Current limit is too restrictive for quarterly analysis.
Multiple remote workers report VPN dropping during Zoom/Teams calls. Affects about 15 users on the GlobalProtect client. Started after the last firewall update.
New employee Maria Santos started Monday and cannot log in to Confluence. HR completed onboarding paperwork but access was not provisioned.
cases.Resolution: Created Confluence account and added to Engineering space. Verified SSO access working correctly.

cases.Case Title: API rate limiting causing data loss
cases.Description: Our webhook endpoint is returning 429 errors under load. Estimated 5% of incoming events are being dropped during peak hours.

cases.Case Title: Printer on 3rd floor printing blank pages
cases.Description: The HP LaserJet on Floor 3 near Engineering is printing blank pages. Toner was recently replaced. Self-test page prints fine.
cases.Resolution: Transfer belt was not seated correctly after toner replacement. Reseated and ran cleaning cycle. Printing normally now.

cases.Description: Product pricing on the customer-facing portal has not updated since the March 15 price adjustment. Customers are seeing old prices but being charged new prices at checkout.

cases.Case Title: Request to add SSO for ServiceNow
cases.Description: IT Security team wants to integrate ServiceNow with our Okta SSO. Currently using separate credentials which violates our security policy.
Production PostgreSQL is hitting max connections (200) during morning batch jobs. Application logs show connection timeout errors from 7:30-8:15 AM daily.
cases.Resolution: Increased connection pool to 300, added connection timeout of 30s, and optimized the morning ETL job to use fewer parallel connections.

cases.Case Title: WiFi dead zone in Building B lobby
cases.Description: Visitors and employees in Building B lobby area have very poor WiFi signal. Speed tests show <2 Mbps. Likely need an additional access point.

cases.Case Title: Automated test suite failing on staging
cases.Description: CI/CD pipeline is failing at the integration test stage. 14 out of 87 tests are failing with database timeout errors on the staging environment.
Three users reported not receiving password reset emails. Checked spam folders. SMTP logs show emails being sent but not delivered to the Exchange server.
cases.Resolution: Exchange transport rule was blocking emails from the application server IP. Added IP to the allow list. Verified delivery working.

cases.Description: The company mobile app crashes immediately after login on devices running iOS 18.2. Affects approximately 30 users who updated their phones this week.

cases.Case Title: Request for dark mode in internal tools
cases.Description: Multiple engineers have requested a dark mode option for internal web applications. Current bright UI causes eye strain during late shifts.

cases.Case Title: Shared drive permissions incorrect after migration
cases.Description: After migrating to SharePoint Online, several team folders have incorrect permissions. Finance team can see HR documents and vice versa.
cases.Resolution: Rebuilt SharePoint permission groups from source AD groups. Verified all 12 team sites have correct access. Added audit logging for permission changes.

cases.Case Title: Jira webhook not triggering Slack notifications
cases.Description: The Jira-to-Slack integration stopped sending notifications for new tickets. Webhook URL is valid but Slack shows no incoming requests in the last 48 hours.
cases.Resolution: Slack app token had expired. Generated new OAuth token and updated the Jira webhook configuration. Notifications flowing again.

cases.Description: External monitor connected via USB-C docking station flickers every 5-10 seconds. Issue started after Windows update KB5034441.

case-notes.Author: Sarah Chen
case-notes.Content: Initial investigation shows database CPU spiking to 95% during report generation. Likely need to optimize the report queries or add read replicas.

case-notes.Author: Sarah Chen
case-notes.Content: Hi Linda, we've identified the root cause as database performance under load. We're working on query optimization and expect a fix within 48 hours.

case-notes.Author: David Kim
case-notes.Content: Moving to In Progress. Found that the Salesforce API token expired. Regenerating token and will rerun the sync.

case-notes.Author: Mike Torres
case-notes.Content: Thunderbolt firmware was outdated. Updated to version 4.2.1 and docking station is now detected. All monitors and peripherals working.

case-notes.Case Title: Data discrepancy in Q1 revenue report
case-notes.Author: Alex Nguyen
case-notes.Content: Comparing dashboard query with CSV export query. Dashboard includes pending transactions while CSV only includes completed ones. Need to align the filters.

case-notes.Author: Sarah Chen
case-notes.Content: Captured packet traces from 3 affected users. The split tunnel configuration appears to be routing video traffic through the VPN tunnel unnecessarily.

case-notes.Author: Sarah Chen
case-notes.Content: We've identified the issue and are testing a configuration change. As a workaround, you can disconnect VPN during video calls if not accessing internal resources.

case-notes.Case Title: API rate limiting causing data loss
case-notes.Author: Alex Nguyen
case-notes.Content: Analyzing the request patterns. Peak hour traffic reaches 500 req/sec but our rate limit is 200/sec. Need to implement a queue with retry logic.

case-notes.Author: David Kim
case-notes.Content: Escalated to Critical. The CDN cache TTL was set to 30 days. Purged the cache and reduced TTL to 1 hour. Verifying pricing updates are propagating.

case-notes.Author: David Kim
case-notes.Content: Root cause confirmed: the morning ETL job was opening 150 connections in parallel. Reduced parallelism to 50 and added connection recycling.

case-notes.Author: Sarah Chen
case-notes.Content: The issue has been resolved. Password reset emails should now arrive within 2 minutes. Please try again and let us know if you have any further issues.

case-notes.Author: David Kim
case-notes.Content: Reproduced on test device. Crash is in the biometric authentication module. iOS 18.2 changed the FaceID API callback signature. Working on a patch.

case-notes.Case Title: Shared drive permissions incorrect after migration
case-notes.Author: Mike Torres
case-notes.Content: Permissions rebuilt for all 12 team sites. Audit log enabled. Closing case after 24 hours of monitoring shows no unauthorized access.

case-notes.Case Title: Jira webhook not triggering Slack notifications
case-notes.Author: David Kim
case-notes.Content: OAuth token had a 90-day expiry that we missed. Added a calendar reminder for token renewal and documented the process in the runbook.

case-notes.Case Title: Automated test suite failing on staging
case-notes.Author: Alex Nguyen
case-notes.Content: The staging database has grown to 50GB without cleanup. Running a maintenance job to purge test data older than 30 days.
